---
title: "RLE Workshop"
format: html
---

## Presentations

- [Presentation 1 — Setup](presentation-1-setup.html)
- [Presentation 2 — Workflow Overview](presentation-2-workflow-overview.html)
- [Presentation 3 — Workflow Demo - Ruritania](presentation-3-workflow-ruritania.html) (small fictional country example)
- [Presentation 4 — Workflow Demo - Colombia](presentation-4-workflow-colombia.html) (country-scale example)
